_comment: AgentHound v0.2 demo — operator's Claude Desktop config. The MCP server entry below references the LiteLLM master key by env var. The Config Collector reads this file (mounted at ./operator-config when seed-demo.sh runs the collector); the value_hash on the resulting :Credential node MATCHES the master Credential the LiteLLM Looter emits, which is the cross-collector merge primitive that lights up cross_service_credential_chain.
